2329900.name: The Last Exam
2329900.description:
Live Dylan’s Last Exam — a heartfelt, hand-drawn watercolor adventure where every choice matters.

🎨 Explore & Uncover:
Wander through a beautifully crafted city on Dylan’s final exam day. Meet quirky locals, revisit his past, and discover hidden memories around every corner.

🧩 Puzzle Your Way Forward:
Solve environmental and logic puzzles using observation and intuition. Every challenge draws you deeper into Dylan’s world.

💭 Personal Storytelling:
Unravel Dylan’s relationships, anxieties, and hopes through tender interactions and emotional flashbacks. A bittersweet journey of memory, healing, and self-discovery.

✨ Why You’ll Love It:

  • Stunning watercolor visuals that feel like moving paintings.

  • Cozy, reflective pacing — ideal for a quiet afternoon of immersive gaming.

A touching, slice‑of‑life narrative with universal themes of growth and closure.

Key Features

  • Explore a handcrafted city filled with character

  • Engage in puzzles that blend logic with emotional storytelling

  • Reveal Dylan’s backstory through voice‑rich dialogue and warm scenes

  • Immerse yourself in an atmospheric, single‑player narrative

  • Supporting Windows & macOS (64‑bit)
2329900.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
